summary: All 3 feature changes verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All Playwright tests passed. 1) UnofficialPill overlay uses 'bottom-2 right-2' positioning. 2) Feed server-side filtering with post_type param works correctly - NOTE/ISO/NOW_SPINNING filters all return correct post types. 3) Profile page has Posts tab with full interactivity (like/comment), infinite scroll, and no 'In Common' tab.

backend_tests.test_feed_no_filter_returns_mixed: PASS - GET /api/feed returns mixed post types
backend_tests.test_feed_filter_note_returns_notes: PASS - GET /api/feed?post_type=NOTE returns only NOTE posts
backend_tests.test_feed_filter_iso_returns_iso: PASS - GET /api/feed?post_type=ISO returns only ISO posts
backend_tests.test_feed_filter_now_spinning: PASS - GET /api/feed?post_type=NOW_SPINNING returns NOW_SPINNING and RANDOMIZER posts
backend_tests.test_feed_pagination_with_filter: PASS - Pagination (before param) works with filters
backend_tests.test_user_posts_cursor_pagination: PASS - before param works for cursor pagination
backend_tests.test_user_posts_without_auth: PASS - Endpoint accessible for public profiles
backend_tests.test_filter_returns_different_results: PASS - Different filters return different subsets

frontend_tests.unofficial_pill_positioning: PASS - UnofficialPill.js line 26: 'bottom-2 right-2' for overlay variant
frontend_tests.feed_filter_dropdown: PASS - Filter trigger and all options found (All, Now Spinning, ISO, Haul, Notes, Polls, For Sale/Trade)
frontend_tests.feed_filter_switching: PASS - Clicking NOTE filter changes filter display to '📝 Notes'
frontend_tests.profile_tabs_present: PASS - All 5 tabs found: Collection, Posts, For Sale, Dream List, ISO
frontend_tests.profile_posts_tab_interactivity: PASS - Posts tab shows 40 posts, 20 like buttons, 20 comment buttons
frontend_tests.profile_posts_infinite_scroll: PASS - Infinite scroll sentinel found for pagination

critical_code_review_comments: UnofficialPill.js correctly positions overlay variant at bottom-right (bottom-2 right-2)
HivePage.js fetchFeed correctly passes post_type param to server, filterInitRef prevents duplicate calls on mount
ProfilePage.js correctly implements Posts tab with PostCard component, handles like/comment/delete/pin actions
explore.py get_user_posts endpoint correctly implements before cursor pagination
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified 3 changes: 1) UnofficialPill overlay uses bottom-2 right-2 (line 26). 2) Feed filtering via post_type query param works server-side with cursor pagination (before param). 3) Profile page has 5 tabs (Collection, Posts, For Sale, Dream List, ISO) - In Common tab removed. Posts tab uses PostCard with full interactivity and InfiniteScrollSentinel. Login uses access_token field.

unofficial_pill_positioning.note: Overlay variant positions pill at bottom-right of album art

feed_server_side_filtering.note: NOW_SPINNING filter returns both NOW_SPINNING and RANDOMIZER posts
